zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia Houghton於1387年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，她的父親Richard de Houghton45歲，母親Joan De Radcliffe47歲。她於1410年與William de Stanley VI在英國爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1466年3月11日之後在她的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Houghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Haughton
meanings: English: habitational name from Haughton (Cheshire, Lancashire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Staffordshire), or Haughton le Skerne (Durham). The placenames derive from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .
Irish: adopted for Ó hEacháin ‘descendant of Eachán’, a pet form of the personal name Eachaidh (see Hoey ).
Irish: adopted for Ó hEachtair ‘descendant of Eachtair’, a personal name of uncertain origin. Compare Hoctor .

variants.name: Hufton
meanings: English: habitational name; probably from Stony Houghton in Pleasley (Derbyshire), the name of which derives from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia Houghton was born in 1387, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Houghton, was 45 and her mother, Joan De Radcliffe, was 47. She married William de Stanley VI in 1410, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. She died after about 11 March 1466, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia Houghton est née en 1387, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Houghton, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Joan De Radcliffe, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé William de Stanley VI en 1410, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée après environ 11 mars 1466, dans sa ville natale.

Sie hat 1410 in Cheshire, England William de Stanley VI geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb nach um 11. März 1466 in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato William de Stanley VI nel 1410, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì dopo il circa 11 marzo 1466, nel sua cittadina.

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia Houghton(이)가 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Houghton(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan De Radcliffe(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1410년 영국 체실르에서 William de Stanley VI(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1466년 3월 11일 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia Houghton nasceu em 1387, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Houghton, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Joan De Radcliffe, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Stanley VI em 1410, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu após aproximadamente 11 de março de 1466, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia Houghton родилась в 1387 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard de Houghton было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan De Radcliffe, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Stanley VI в 1410 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла после около 11 марта 1466 г. в её родном городе.
